items.title: [正面] The game is surprisingly good. I played it because...
items.summary: The game is surprisingly good. I played it because of the Saya no Uta collaboration and expected it to be some gacha slop, but it subvert my expectation. The gameplay, story, and character designs have hooked me in.
items.review: The game is surprisingly good. I played it because of the Saya no Uta collaboration and expected it to be some gacha slop, but it subvert my expectation. The gameplay, story, and character designs have hooked me in.

items.title: [正面] Really cool game. Not money-grabby at all so far....
items.summary: Really cool game. Not money-grabby at all so far. Actual skill involvement so you can go past the recommended level caps. Anime girl Black Butler in terms of plot; shockingly well written.
items.review: Really cool game. Not money-grabby at all so far. Actual skill involvement so you can go past the recommended level caps. Anime girl Black Butler in terms of plot; shockingly well written.

items.title: [正面] The game is so graphic that despite being a Chines...
items.summary:
The game is so graphic that despite being a Chinese game, it cannot pass local regulation to be released at home. 

I think that should suffice to pique your curiosity.
items.review:
The game is so graphic that despite being a Chinese game, it cannot pass local regulation to be released at home. 

I think that should suffice to pique your curiosity.

items.title: [正面] 非常好的克苏鲁like设定，非常有趣的[spoiler] 杀戮尖塔 [/spoiler]like玩法...
items.summary: 非常好的克苏鲁like设定，非常有趣的[spoiler] 杀戮尖塔 [/spoiler]like玩法，忘却篇——在游玩时长上相比塔会减少很多（毕竟有局外养成）但也有在塔1的基础上创新玩法而非照搬（后续也被塔2借鉴了个别机制），主线篇章转到星辰篇后速战速决的机制也很爽，练度上来了完全战斗爽）））顺便如果玩不太来忘的bb们也可以去[spoiler] 杀戮尖塔 [/spoiler]进修一下[strike]这算夹带私货吗 [/strike]。游戏抽卡资源送得很多，平时大小福利不断，抽卡价格相比国内二游也不算贵

items.title:
[正面] 最愛深海寶寶們
美術風格跟配音都愛了，可以自選男女主，說難嗎說不上很難，但文字量有點多(我是一開始看...
items.summary:
最愛深海寶寶們
美術風格跟配音都愛了，可以自選男女主，說難嗎說不上很難，但文字量有點多(我是一開始看到卡牌上一堆字先眼花了*-*)，不過後來逐漸排出自己喜歡的隊伍後也慢慢上手一些遊戲機制了(反擊好玩，粉髮凱凱愛你)
劇情都還不錯，這是少數每次劇情章節我不太會跳過的，但一堆刀我受不了啊QQ (不過世界觀就是如此，幸好還有銀芯技術)
items.review:
最愛深海寶寶們
美術風格跟配音都愛了，可以自選男女主，說難嗎說不上很難，但文字量有點多(我是一開始看到卡牌上一堆字先眼花了*-*)，不過後來逐漸排出自己喜歡的隊伍後也慢慢上手一些遊戲機制了(反擊好玩，粉髮凱凱愛你)
劇情都還不錯，這是少數每次劇情章節我不太會跳過的，但一堆刀我受不了啊QQ (不過世界觀就是如此，幸好還有銀芯技術)
